title: Query mass email engagement in contact record
excerpt: The request is to be able to capture mass email tracking data (e.g., deliveries, opens, clicks) in individual contact records in the CRM.

posts.author: cstorer (cstorer@aircarehealth.com)
posts.cookedHtml: The request is to be able to capture mass email tracking data (e.g., deliveries, opens, clicks) in individual contact records in the CRM.
